columns.extraction_plan: The text states "Between 15 November 2011 and 17 January 2014, 1917 patients were randomised to the arms of STAMPEDE constituting the 'abiraterone comparison'. Of these, all 1003 patients with metastatic disease were analysed here: 502 (50%) allocated to standard treatment (SOC-alone group) and 501 (50%) to standard treatment plus abiraterone and prednisolone (SOC + AAP group)". Therefore: Treatment Arm: SOC-alone group, N = 502; Treatment Arm: SOC + AAP group, N = 501
